name: Hive
author: John Yianni / Gen42 Games (2001) / AGP port
description: John Yianni's boardless tile game: the insect tiles ARE the board. Place and move your bugs -- Queen, Spiders, Beetles, Grasshoppers, Soldier Ants -- to completely surround the opponent's Queen Bee while keeping the hive connected (the one-hive rule).
